sglang.title: feat: return partial generation results when aborting requests in waiting queue
sglang.author: guoyuhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Partial rollout is a common practice in reinforcement learning (RL). Sglang provides abort_request to terminate incomplete inference requests. However, when a request is aborted while still in the waiting queue, the current implementation returns an un-prefilled (i.e., empty) result. Whil

sglang.title: [Bug fix] trace: fix import error in mini_lb if sgl-router image does not install sglang
sglang.author: sufeng-buaa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The tracing package is implemented in sglang, so if mini_lb wants to enable tracing, it needs to import sglang.srt.tracing.trace. However, if the sgl-router image does not include sglang, this will cause an import error in mini_lb.
Thanks for reporting this bug @jinmingyi1998
Modification

Motivation
As trtllm backend don't support sm120, we need to use flashinfer backend instead. Current prefill in flashinfer backend for sm120 have to use paged attention as the cutlass backend will fail otherwise. But paged attention only support weight absorb path for MLA. For prefill it's better to

sglang.title: [router] refactor mcp to use LRU and fix pooling bug
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
Dynamic MCP clients accumulated indefinitely in memory:

Inventory had TTL-based cleanup that expired and removed tools
Dynamic clients had no eviction mechanism and grew unbounded
This created a memory leak where old clients remained in the map forever
Tools would disappear from inventory,

sglang.title: Fuse wk and weight_proj in Indexer for DeepSeekV3.2-FP4
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Since wk and weight_proj in Indexer have the same input, they can be fused into a single gemm by concatenating weights.
For the base DeepSeekV3.2-Exp model, wk is FP8 and weight_proj is BF16, so we would need to dequantize wk first. It might still provide a speedup and can be added in a f

Fix incorrect definition of extends in #27367, more extensive unit tests, fix reordering bug when multiple swaps are involved + light refactor.
Credit to @ganyi1996ppo for finding the issue

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Cleanup deprecated nightly benchmark and adjust the docstring for performance benchmark
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Cleanup the nightly benchmark suite because of two reasons:

The codepath of comparing vLLM against other engines is no longer maintained.
The performance benchmarking CI is now triggered under Pytorch Hub instead of in vLLM's CI pipeline.

Test Plan
Test Result

vllm.title: Add more dims for batch invariant shims
vllm.author: bwasti
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Matmul can handle more dimensions than were implemented.
Purpose
Adds matmul support for more dimensions than before.
Test Plan
Run all batch invariance tests.
Test Result
Pass.
